provider: The Education University of Hong Kong 2026/27 Undergraduate Programme Course List

supplements.evidenceNote: The official programme-specific PDF identifies Programme A5B109, Year of Entry 2026/27 and publishes 41 coded courses across Discipline Studies Major, Education Major, Cross-faculty Core, Education Studies Core and Pedagogy groups. It does not publish per-course credit points, Year/Semester assignments, the number of Major Electives or Cross-faculty options to select, the Education Studies Restricted Elective pool, or coded lists for Field Experience, General Education, Language Enhancement and Final Year Project. This supplement exposes only the verified published course subset and does not present it as a complete 156-cp graduation structure.
